programme.title: beIN STORY
programme.desc: beIN STORY est un rendez-vous documentaire, de 70 à 90 minutes, revenant sur un moment clé de l'histoire du sport ou sur une légende des stades. L'émission est présentée par le ou la journaliste et l'un(e) des consultant(e)s du sport concerné. Evènement imprévu, athlète au destin tragique ou moment crucial qui a changé pour toujours une discipline sportive, beIN STORY présente de grands documentai

programme.title: Le Rêve d'une vie
programme.desc: En 2025, le Serbe Novak Djokovic s'apprête à disputer Wimbledon pour la 20ème fois. Son rêve d'enfant était de soulever le trophée, il va y parvenir à 7 reprises. "Le Rêve d'une vie" raconte l'histoire d'un garçon né en ex-Yougoslavie qui découvre le gazon en 2005, et qui va y prendre goût au point d'en déguster quelques brins d'herbe à chaque victoire finale.

programme.title: 1-TO-11
programme.desc: Gabby Agbonlahor sits down for 1-to-11 to reveal his ultimate Aston Villa lineup, made up of the teammates he played alongside. A true one-club man, Gabby reflects on his journey from academy prospect to first-team star, sharing stories of the players who made the biggest impact during his time at Villa Park. His Villa XI is full of character, quality, and claret-and-blue pride.

programme.title: PL STORIES
programme.desc: We follow the rise of one of Italy's most gifted midfielders and his journey to Premier League stardom at Newcastle United, Sandro Tonali. From his early days at Brescia, where his talent drew comparisons to Italian greats, to his development at AC Milan and eventual move to St. James' Park, we trace Tonali's evolution on and off the pitch.

programme.title: PL GOATS
programme.desc: PL GOATs provides a fresh take on one of the oldest conversations in sport - just who is the greatest? Our panel will discuss and then decide with the help of archive, stats and first-hand testimony. Each episode focuses on a classic Premier League fan debate.

programme.title: PL REWIND
programme.desc: Gianfranco Zola signed for Chelsea in November 1996, aged 30. The Little Magician became a trailblazer as one of the Premier League's first genuine flair players, and by the time of his departure seven seasons later, he had established himself as an all-time great at Stamford Bridge.

programme.title: PL REWIND
programme.desc: With 5 Premier League titles and 187 goals, Andrew Cole is one of English football's true icons. He recounts his greatest strikes, most memorable partnerships, and relives all the final day drama from his Manchester United years.
